description_long: This is a modern circular bungalow set within a triangular plot of land, surrounded by manicured lawns and bordered by rows of trees and shrubs. The building features a unique ring-shaped structure with a central open courtyard, visible through multiple large windows distributed evenly around the exterior. The main entrance is accessible via a straight pathway leading from a driveway area with several parked cars. The exterior walls are predominantly white with blue window frames, and the roof appears flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles. The landscaping includes both ornamental and privacy plantings, with purple-flowering bushes adding color to the perimeter. The overall setting suggests a private, upscale residential property designed for comfort and visual appeal.
description: A modern, circular white bungalow with a central courtyard, flat roof, and blue-trimmed windows, set in a landscaped triangular lot with trees, shrubs, and a driveway.
description_view_0: Shows the front entrance, central courtyard, and driveway with parked cars, bordered by trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Highlights the side of the bungalow, the driveway, and the extensive lawn area with a row of trees along the back.
description_view_2: Displays the rear of the bungalow, the circular structure, and dense shrubbery along the edge of the property.
description_view_3: Presents a side view with the flat roof, purple-flowering bushes, and the full length of the triangular lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: evenly spaced windows encircling the structure
